overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a desert shantytown market in the Badlands. The player moves past makeshift stalls, vending machines, and NPC vendors while approaching the Night City skyline in the distance. The scene features warm desert lighting, corrugated metal structures, and scattered abandoned vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt road toward the market area, passing abandoned vehicles and corrugated metal shacks

entered.detail: tall industrial water tower with metal framework and tank on top
weathered corrugated metal building with wooden trim and windows
rusted red pickup truck with off-road tires parked beside the road
tall palm tree rising above the buildings
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert road approaching a shantytown. A tall metal water tower dominates the right side while abandoned vehicles and makeshift metal buildings line the left. The camera moves forward along the dirt trail under clear afternoon skies with sparse desert vegetation visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market stalls with clothing vendors

events.description: enters the market area from the open road, passing under makeshift awnings

agents.ego_description: moving through the market entrance, glancing at clothing stalls and merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind clothing rack arranging merchandise

entered.detail: metal rack with hanging jackets and shirts under fabric awning
white plastic mannequin torso displaying clothing items
corrugated metal and fabric roof providing partial shade over merchandise
tall red vending machine with illuminated display and product selection buttons

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a bustling market area with makeshift stalls selling clothing and goods. Vendors and shoppers populate the scene while the camera passes a white mannequin and clothing racks. The water tower recedes behind as the path narrows between corrugated metal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market pathway between vending machines and stalls

events.description: passes close to a blue vending machine temporarily blocking the left side view

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight spaces between market stalls, passing vendors and merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: woman in shorts and tank top walking toward the camera through the market

entered.detail: light blue industrial vending machine with graffiti and warning stickers
empty metal wire shelving rack beside a stall
stacked wooden shipping pallets used as makeshift platforms

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market through narrow pathways between stalls. The camera passes blue and red vending machines, wooden pallets, and metal shelving units. The space becomes more enclosed with awnings blocking the sky, creating mixed lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert overlook with Night City skyline view

events.description: exits the covered market area into open desert with view of distant city skyline
emerges from shade into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking along the market edge toward the open desert, observing the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: man in cowboy hat leaning against railing looking out at the desert

entered.detail: distant futuristic city towers with the distinctive Night City sign visible
tall yucca tree with spiky branches silhouetted against the sky
plastic red chairs and metal tables arranged outside a food stall
white and orange plastic tables with drinks and items on them

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the market into a wide-open desert area with a panoramic view of the Night City skyline in the distance. The lighting shifts to bright backlit sun creating lens flare. Red plastic chairs and tables are arranged near the market edge where NPCs sit and stand, and a Joshua tree stands silhouetted against the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter with seating area

events.description: approaches food stall counter where vendor is seated, dialogue option appears

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall counter to interact with the vendor, passing seated customers

notable_agents.action: vendor in red shirt and cowboy hat sitting at the counter eating
woman in green top and face mask standing behind the counter

entered.detail: long metal counter with food preparation items and serving surface
red and glass food display warmer with shelves for hot items
stack of newspapers and magazines on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a food stall at the market's edge. The camera approaches the metal counter where a vendor in a cowboy hat sits eating, while another vendor stands behind the counter. A red food warmer and newspapers sit on the counter. The Night City skyline is no longer visible as the camera faces the stall structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open desert road into the dense, enclosed corridors of a shantytown market. It begins on a wide dirt trail under clear afternoon skies, passing a towering metal water tower on the right and abandoned vehicles beside makeshift buildings on the left. As the camera advances, the open landscape narrows into a bustling marketplace where the water tower recedes and the path is lined with clothing racks, mannequins, and active vendors. The scene then shifts deeper into the settlement, weaving through tight pathways flanked by blue and red vending machines, wooden pallets, and metal shelving. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly claustrophobic as overhead awnings block the sky, transitioning the bright desert light into a mix of shadowed corridors.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, sun-drenched desert vista into the intimate details of a roadside food stall. It begins by emerging from the market into an open expanse, where the lighting shifts to a bright backlit sun that creates lens flare against the distant silhouette of the Night City skyline. As the camera moves past red plastic chairs and a silhouetted Joshua tree, the panoramic view of the city gradually recedes from sight. The scene then shifts focus toward the market's edge, closing in on a metal counter where a vendor in a cowboy hat sits eating. Finally, the camera settles on the stall's surface, highlighting a red food warmer and scattered newspapers as the surrounding desert landscape disappears behind the structure.
